current_task.name: target_transform_blend_stage
current_task.summary: Ran sqrt/pow075 target-transform variants on TE05 features and built a confirmed log1p/sqrt/pow075 OOF blend.

runs.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --output-dir outputs/codex_lightgbm_kfold_seed42 --predict-test true

python scripts/train.py --model-name catboost --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --output-dir outputs/codex_catboost_kfold_seed42 --predict-test true

completed_tasks.name: feature_engineering_diagnostics_and_plan
key_findings: Top price decile p10 contributes about 33.34% of total absolute error with MAE 1973.591 and average underprediction bias -729.483.
High-price old-car slices are weak: p10+8y_plus MAE 2717.934 and bias -1732.356; p10+5_8y MAE 1795.315 and bias -785.636.
The first experiment batch should prioritize non-target power-age, model-age peer stats, and brand-relative features before target encoding.

first_batch_experiments.name: power_age
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-power-age true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe01_power_age --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: model_age_group_stats
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-model-age-group-stats true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe02_model_age_group_stats --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: brand_relative
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-brand-relative true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe03_brand_relative --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: power_age_model_age_stats
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-power-age true --use-model-age-group-stats true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe04_power_age_model_age_stats --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: power_age_brand_relative
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-power-age true --use-brand-relative true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe05_power_age_brand_relative --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: non_target_combined
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-power-age true --use-model-age-group-stats true --use-brand-relative true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe06_non_target_combined --predict-test true

first_batch_experiments.name: power_age_age_detail
first_batch_experiments.command: python scripts/train.py --model-name lightgbm --cv-strategy kfold --cv-repeats 1 --n-splits 5 --cv-random-state 42 --model-random-state 42 --use-power-age true --use-age-detail true --output-dir outputs/feature_experiments/fe07_power_age_age_detail --predict-test true

completed_tasks.name: enhanced_target_encoding_feature_stage
completed_tasks.decision: No enhanced TE variant beat TE05 KFold; retain TE05-confirmed as best verified model.

pending_tasks: Align current E017 reproduction outputs against historical E017 member artifacts before claiming a true metric improvement.
Validate additional power_age blend members: log_s5_power_age, log_s15_power_age, log_s30_power_age.
Tune CatBoost-specific parameters before using it as a production candidate because default CatBoost underperformed LightGBM in this run.
Compare submission_003_target_transform_blend.csv against leaderboard/online MAE when available.
Consider adding another diverse blend member, e.g. tuned CatBoost or LightGBM with different num_leaves, only after recording online result.
key_decisions: Only confirmed metrics from existing project documents were included in the experiment report.
Historical E017 remains the recorded online-best baseline until reproduction differences are fully aligned.
The current model-training task used offline CV before writing full-fit prediction/model artifacts.
LightGBM is selected as best_model.pkl for this run because its 5-fold OOF MAE is lower than CatBoost.
Feature engineering optimization will start with non-target features before fold-safe target encoding.
First-batch feature promotion requires at least 3.0 OOF MAE improvement and no material regression on high-price old-car slices.
FE05 power_age_brand_relative is the confirmed first-batch non-target feature candidate.
The next optimization stage should use FE05 as the base and add fold-safe target encoding variants.
TE05 all_non_target_model_te_s10 is the current best verified feature-engineering model.
The best TE interaction uses all non-target feature switches plus fold-safe model target encoding with smoothing 10.
Backoff/model-age/brand-age/low-frequency TE variants did not beat TE05; retain TE05-confirmed as best verified single model.
Next optimization should focus on target transform diversity or blending, not more TE columns in the current LightGBM setup.
TT04 confirmed blend is the current best submission artifact with meta-CV MAE 529.0655.
TT01 sqrt confirmed is the current best single-model artifact and best_model.pkl points to it.

issues.description: .agent/context.json was empty at the earlier report task start and did not contain experiment status.
CatBoost was not installed in the environment at task start; requirements.txt was updated and catboost was installed before training.
